Class Author

java.lang.Object
com.library.model.Author
public class Author extends Object
Represents an author entity in the Library Management System.

Maps to the authors table in the database: 

  id (PK) | full_name | country | birth_year

An author may have zero or more associated Book records. Deletion of an author is restricted by the database if any books reference it.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    birthYear
    Year of birth; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).
    private String
    country
    Country of origin; nullable.
    private String
    fullName
    Full display name of the author (NOT NULL in DB).
    private int
    id
    Primary key.

    Constructor
    Description
    Author()
    No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.
    Author(int id, String fullName, String country, int birthYear)

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Primary key. Set by the database on INSERT.

    • fullName

      private String fullName
      Full display name of the author (NOT NULL in DB).

    • country

      private String country
      Country of origin; nullable.

    • birthYear

      private int birthYear
      Year of birth; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).

  • Constructor Details

    • Author

      public Author()
      No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    • Author

      public Author(int id, String fullName, String country, int birthYear)
      Full constructor used by AuthorDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.
      Parameters:
      id - primary key
      fullName - full name of the author
      country - country of origin (may be null)
      birthYear - birth year, or 0 if unknown

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      primary key of this author

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns:
      full display name

    • getCountry

      public String getCountry()
      Returns:
      country of origin, or null

    • getBirthYear

      public int getBirthYear()
      Returns:
      birth year, or 0 if not set

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - primary key (assigned after INSERT)

    • setFullName

      public void setFullName(String n)
      Parameters:
      n - full display name (must not be blank)

    • setCountry

      public void setCountry(String country)
      Parameters:
      country - country of origin; null is allowed

    • setBirthYear

      public void setBirthYear(int y)
      Parameters:
      y - birth year; pass 0 to store NULL in the database
